title: aster novi-belgii var. tardiflorus
intro: Aster novi-belgii var. tardiflorus, also known as Late Blooming New York Aster, is a variety of flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and tall stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii var. tardiflorus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antihistamine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
